microsoft_ft: Drove hardware-resilience program from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, defining scope, requirements, and roadmaps that sustained **45+ annual validation drills** and delivered **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Led 0→1 development of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements, milestones, and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by **30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, accountable delivery model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level testing program, executing concept-to-production delivery in **4 months** with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model across cross-functional engineering teams.

Synchronized **14 cross-org executions** spanning hardware, supply chain, firmware, and test teams under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Proactively identified and resolved program risks with structured mitigation plans while building an internal AI agent that cut planning cycle time by **39%** and increased drill capacity by **21%**, refining program-management methodology across teams.

Maintained open stakeholder communication through regular status reporting on key metrics, wins, challenges, and escalations, aligning expectations and steering teams away from non-critical activities to optimize productivity toward unified program objectives.
microsoft_2023: Championed product adoption for AI-driven code-generation workflows, conducting hands-on user demos and training sessions that drove utilization across **14 key engineering teams** and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** in a fast-paced technical environment.

Influenced the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, rapidly grasping complex technical concepts to document and prioritize critical feature gaps with stakeholders.

Optimized data integrity and retrieval by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time by **83%** and improving cross-team access to engineering program knowledge.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions **28% faster** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning **140+ engineering teams** toward shared program milestones.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with **20+ service teams** to identify **81 hours of manual effort per region** and building a roadmap to automate critical-path deliverables.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across **140+ teams**, enabling leadership to target automation gaps, prioritize high-impact support, and provide regular data-driven updates on program status and key metrics.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy and mapping dependencies across **1,200+ stations**, coordinating closely with manufacturing and engineering stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process for a medium-to-high volume hardware-software pipeline.

Drove strategic alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering teams to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by **25%** and reducing manual handoffs across the cross-functional delivery path.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** via a new CRM process, improving documentation and organizational rigor across the sales pipeline.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by **2.7%** by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to align stakeholder expectations with measurable outcomes.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks to inform high-impact prioritization decisions and continuous process improvement.

tailoring_notes: Mirrored JD vocabulary: program roadmaps, milestones, critical paths, cross-functional teams (hardware, supply chain, manufacturing, firmware, test), risk mitigation, stakeholder communication.
Led with concept-to-mass-production framing and hardware-validation emphasis to map Azure resilience work onto Tesla Displays electronic-systems context.
Swapped all titles to Technical Program Manager labels and expanded bullets to dense 2-line versions to fill the page.
